code: import React,{useEffect,useMemo,useState}from"react";import api from"../services/api";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs,Fragment as _Fragment}from"react/jsx-runtime";const VolunteerDashboard=()=>{const[volunteers,setVolunteers]=useState([]);const[status,setStatus]=useState("in_progress");const user=useMemo(()=>JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem("user")||"null"),[]);const fetchVolunteers=async()=>{const{data}=await api.get("/volunteers");setVolunteers(data);};useEffect(()=>{fetchVolunteers();},[]);const myVolunteerRecord=volunteers.find(v=>{var _v$userId;return((_v$userId=v.userId)===null||_v$userId===void 0?void 0:_v$userId._id)===(user===null||user===void 0?void 0:user.id);});const updateTaskStatus=async e=>{e.preventDefault();if(!myVolunteerRecord)return;await api.put(`/volunteers/${myVolunteerRecord._id}`,{status});fetchVolunteers();};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{children:"Volunteer Dashboard"}),myVolunteerRecord?/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(_Fragment,{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("strong",{children:"Assigned Task:"})," ",myVolunteerRecord.assignedTask||"No task assigned"]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("strong",{children:"Current Status:"})," ",myVolunteerRecord.status]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("form",{onSubmit:updateTaskStatus,children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{value:status,onChange:e=>setStatus(e.target.value),placeholder:"Update status"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{type:"submit",children:"Update Task Status"})]})]}):/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{children:"No assignment found for your account."})]});};export default VolunteerDashboard;
